text:
www/qt4-webkit failes to compile

Fix: 

I have no fix for this.
How-To-Repeat: 	accessibility/AccessibilityObject.cpp failes to compile
	with 
[...]
In file included from accessibility/AXObjectCache.h:30,
                 from accessibility/AccessibilityImageMapLink.cpp:33:
page/EventHandler.h:235: error: 'Timer' is not a template
[...]
